{{Quote|Whoop! You see that, pop? How's that for flyin'?|Micah to [[Rawk|Nat Skywalker]]|<ref name="Legacy 23" />}}
'''Micah''' was the [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] adoptive child of [[Rawk|Nat Skywalker]], then going by the alias "Bantha" Rawk, and [[Droo Rawk|Droo]], and the step-sibling of [[Ahnah Rawk|Ahnah]] and [[Skeeto Rawk|Skeeto]], who lived during the time of the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. Micah had [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] [[Limb/Legends|legs]], built by Nat himself.

==Biography==
Micah was once [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] until he was freed from his plight by "Bantha Rawk", also known as [[Rawk|Nat Skywalker]]. However, Micah's damaged [[Limb/Legends|legs]] could not be saved; Nat's wife [[Droo Rawk|Droo]] [[Force healing/Legends|healed]] the stricken [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] to a certain extent, but his original legs had to be replaced by [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] ones.<ref name="Legacy 24" />

Micah fought alongside his family in [[Skirmish on Iego|defending]] the [[Rawk's Nest|Nest]] from [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] invaders. While [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] a [[Model 67 Shrieker speeder bike|speeder]], he tricked one [[Quickfire speeder bike|swoop]] into a wall with impressive piloting skills. His family was also assisted by the [[Mynock (Helot-class)|''Mynock'']], piloted by [[Cade Skywalker]], [[Jariah Syn]] and [[Deliah Blue]].<ref name="Legacy 23" />

Four [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later, Micah and his family were enjoying an outdoor fun session. His family later watched the holonews about the [[Massacre of New Coral City|Massacre on Mon Calamari]], and it was then that Cade revealed that he was a Skywalker.<ref name="Legacy 24" /> Afterward, Micah and his family, except his father, moved to [[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jan Duursema]] once referred to Micah as "Micah Skywalker" on [[TheForce.net]] [[Jedi Council Forums|message boards]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/29048341|board=Literature|thread=Which species would you like to see be expanded on in the existing comics?|user=Jan_Duursema|date=2008-08-26|time=8:58 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200802095800/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/which-species-would-you-like-to-see-be-expanded-on-in-the-existing-comics.29039570/page-2}}</ref> However, that name to date has not been mentioned in any [[canon]]ical source and, given that fact that Micah was unaware of his adoptive father's heritage, remains utterly speculative.
